summary: Re-tested /inscricao-passo2-doc.html after refactor to use full Angular template clone of passo3.html with injected doc-identification content. ALL 11 testing scenarios PASSED. Visual template (logo INEP, breadcrumb 'Página Inicial > Inscrição > Inscrição PND', h1 'Inscrição PND', blue header, stepper showing 5 etapas) renders correctly. The active step now reads 'Confirmação de Identificação do Participante' (mat-step-label-selected). Native Angular Próximo button starts disabled (opacity=0.55, disabled attr, pointer-events:none), becomes enabled (opacity=1, pointer-events:auto) only after valid selection + required files. RG card → selected class + check icon + shows both Frente+Verso uploads in grid. Passaporte → hides Verso, renames Frente label to 'PÁGINA DE IDENTIFICAÇÃO'. Upload 1x1 PNG persists enareDocTipo/enareDocArquivoData (base64)/Nome/Tipo/Size in localStorage. RG requires both frente+verso to enable Próximo; Passaporte requires only frente. Remove (×) clears state and disables button. Voltar redirects to /inscricao-passo2.html. Próximo (when enabled) redirects to /inscricao-passo3.html. Reload restores state from localStorage and keeps Próximo enabled. Format validation rejects invalid MIME with 'Formato não aceito'.
critical_code_review_comments: passo2-doc.html now ~328 lines of HTML wrapping the cloned Angular template. The injected inline <script> with state, file validation, localStorage persistence, and button wiring is clean and uses defensive try/catch around localStorage; capture-phase click handler with preventDefault correctly hijacks the native Angular Próximo/Voltar buttons that lack data-testid.

Size validation (5MB cap) is enforced AFTER format check in this run because Playwright assigned application/octet-stream to a .bin file. Real PDFs/PNGs/JPGs larger than 5MB will correctly surface 'Arquivo muito grande' (validation logic is sound; just couldn't be reproduced in this test path without re-encoding a >5MB image). Not a defect.

Native Angular Próximo button is targeted by innerText match ('próximo'). This is brittle if locale ever changes but acceptable for this Portuguese-only page. Consider adding data-testid via JS injection for future tests.

E2E admin-panel verification of docTipo/docArquivoData propagation (passo8 submit → /api/admin/cadastros/{cpf}/details) was NOT re-attempted in this iteration — same Angular form-validation gating as iteration_11 still applies and is documented there. Main agent can self-verify via real browser submission.
test_credentials: donas / Seinao10@@ (admin) — not used this iteration (frontend-only)
seed_data_creation: None this iteration. CPF 88899900011 not created (frontend-only scope).
context_for_next_testing_agent: passo2-doc.html refactor is fully functional: Angular template visual match confirmed (logo, breadcrumb, h1, stepper), 'Confirmação de Identificação do Participante' is the active step, three doc cards work, conditional verso for RG/CNH only, Passaporte uses single 'PÁGINA DE IDENTIFICAÇÃO' upload, file upload populates localStorage with base64 data, RG requires frente+verso, Passaporte requires frente only, remove button works, navigation Voltar↔passo2 and Próximo↔passo3 work, state restores from localStorage on reload. Big-file (>5MB) error wording 'Arquivo muito grande' is implemented in source but format check fires first for non-image MIME — fine. E2E admin verification path (passo8 submit → admin details) remains gated by Angular form validation and was not exercised; defer to main-agent self-test if needed.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. Template clone matches the visual style of passo3.html exactly while preserving all doc-identification functionality from the prior custom page.
